(अ).— — — — क犆灶ीय सरकार, कंपनी (संशोधन) अिधिनयम, 2017 (2018 का 1) क琉 धारा 1 क琉 उपधारा (2) 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए 31 जुलाई, 2018 को उस तारीख के 牲प म犆 िनयत करती है िजसको उ猴 अिधिनयम क琉 धारा 36 के उपबंध 灹वृ牵 ह犘गे। [फा.सं.1/1/2018-सीएल.I] के.वी.आर. मू琔त榁, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 31st July, 2018 S.O. 3838(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of section 1 of the Companies (Amendment) Act, 2017 (1 of 2018), the Central Government hereby appoints the day of 31st July, 2018 as the date on which the provisions of Section 36 of the said Act shall come into force. [F. No. 1 /1 /2018-CL.I] K.V.R. MURTY, Jt.
